title: helianthemum strictum
intro: Helianthemum strictum, commonly known as rockrose, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, pink or white flowers and fragrant foliage. Traditionally, rockrose has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's medicinal properties are said to offer various health benefits, including wound healing, relief from arthritis and gout, and protection against infections. Rockrose can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves for topical application, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of natural remedies.
